parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: inline lists dictionaries comments and quoted scalars
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
# top-level comments are ignored
flags: [onlyStrict, "raw # value", false, null, 'it''s'] # trailing comment
features: [BigInt, class-fields-private]
negative: { phase: parse, type: SyntaxError, note: "colon: stays" }
description: "line\nwith\ttab and \"quote\""
esid: 'sec-example'
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: block lists dictionaries and empty keys
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
includes:
  - sta.js
  - assert.js
features:
  - BigInt
  - "class-fields-private"
negative:
  phase: runtime
  type: TypeError
emptyKey:
not yaml metadata
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: literal and folded block scalars
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
info: |
  first line
  second line

  next paragraph
summary: >
  folded line
  continues

  next paragraph
---*/

expected.info:
first line
second line

next paragraph

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: comment stripping respects quotes and nesting
double quoted escapes
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
newlineTabQuote: "line\nwith\ttab and \"quote\""
slashes: "backslash\\ slash\/ apostrophe\'"
hexUnicode: "\x41 and \u263A"
escapedSpace: "left\ right"
controlEscapes: "nul\0 bell\a backspace\b vtab\v esc\e carriage\r"
---*/

expected.controlEscapes: nul� bell backspace  vtab esc carriage

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: malformed and unknown double quoted escapes
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
shortHex: "\x1"
badHex: "\xGG"
shortUnicode: "\u12"
badUnicode: "\u12G4"
unknown: "\q and \."
trailingBackslash: "ends\"
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: single quotes and empty quoted strings
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
single: 'it''s fine'
singleQuoteChar: ''''
emptySingle: ''
emptyDouble: ""
quotedComma: 'a,b'
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: inline CSV nesting and quoted commas
empty inline collections and malformed dict entries
indented blocks with blank lines
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
includes:
  - sta.js

  - assert.js
features:
  - BigInt

  - Atomics
details:
  phase: runtime

  note: "blank lines kept out"
  malformed child
  empty:
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: block scalar blank and trailing newline edges
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
emptyLiteral: |

literalLeadingTrailing: |

  first line
  second line

foldedTrailing: >
  folded
  line

next: value
---*/
